regions.text: What do seven and eleven make? What do twenty and forty make? What do thirteen and thirty make? What do two hundred and three and three hundred and four make?
Where does the sun come up and where does it go down? Does day come after night? Does night come after day?
This is a letter. Where do we put Mr. Green's street and town and state on the letter?
Tom's work at school is learning. He is a learner. What is the teacher's work?
